assignments.title: ABC264B Nice Grid
assignments.reason: (R+C)%2==0 输出 black 否则 white

assignments.title: ABC264C Matrix Reducing
assignments.reason: 二维数组：枚举保留行/列子集（位枚举），检查子矩阵是否等于 B

assignments.title: ABC264D "redocta".swap
assignments.reason: 前缀和：对 atcoder 每字符在 S 中位置，累加逆序距离即最少交换次数

assignments.title: ABC264E Blackout 2
assignments.reason: 并查集离线：倒序添加边判断各时刻通电城市数

assignments.title: ABC264Ex Perfect Binary Tree
assignments.reason: 树形计数DP：对每个节点统计子树中大小恰为 2^k-1 的完美二叉子树数

assignments.title: ABC264F Monochromatic Path
assignments.reason: 2-SAT（依赖 Tarjan SCC）：行列翻转决策建 2-SAT，检验通路存在的最小代价

assignments.title: ABC264G String Fair
assignments.reason: Bellman-Ford：字符转换图找正环（返回 Infinity），否则最长路

assignments.title: ABC265A Apple
assignments.reason: for 循环枚举购买 k 组3个，min(k*Y+(N-3k)*X)

assignments.title: ABC265B Explore
assignments.reason: 模拟：逐房间移动，遇奖励房间加时间，判是否能到达 N

assignments.title: ABC265C Belt Conveyor
assignments.reason: 模拟：按方向移动，用 visited 标记判断是否进入循环

assignments.title: ABC265D Iroha and Haiku
assignments.reason: 前缀和：枚举三段分界点，前缀和快速验证三段和

assignments.title: ABC265E Warp
assignments.reason: 线性DP：dp[i][j] = 使用了 i 次 AB 和 j 次 CD 到达对应点的方案数

assignments.title: ABC265Ex No-capture Lance Game
assignments.reason: SG 函数：每行棋子对数的 nim-value 异或，分析行独立博弈

assignments.title: ABC265F Manhattan Café
assignments.reason: 状压DP：按维枚举分布，逐维合并两点 |x-y|≤D 的格点区间计数

assignments.title: ABC265G 012 Inversion
assignments.reason: 线段树：维护区间逆序对+懒惰标记批量替换（012→SUT）

assignments.title: ABC266A Middle Letter
assignments.reason: 输出 S[(|S|-1)/2]，整除定位中心字符

assignments.title: ABC266B Modulo Number
assignments.reason: 数论：负数取模处理 ((N%p)+p)%p

assignments.title: ABC266C Convex Quadrilateral
assignments.reason: 计算几何：叉积逐顶点检验内角全<180°

assignments.title: ABC266D Snuke Panic (1D)
assignments.reason: 线性DP：按时间排序，dp[x]=在位置x的最大收益

assignments.title: ABC266E Throwing the Die
assignments.reason: 期望DP逆推：E[i]=max(cur_roll_avg, E[i+1])，每轮与已有期望比较

assignments.title: ABC266Ex Snuke Panic (2D)
assignments.reason: 线段树+DP：y 方向用线段树优化 dp 转移

assignments.title: ABC266F Well-defined Path Queries
assignments.reason: 并查集：N点N边图找环的连通分量，不同分量内两端点唯一路径

assignments.title: ABC266G Yet Another RGB Sequence
assignments.reason: 容斥原理+组合数：固定'RG'块k次出现后统计RBG序列方案数

assignments.title: ABC267A Saturday
assignments.reason: if/else：根据输入 weekday name 输出距周六天数

assignments.title: ABC267B Split?
assignments.reason: 暴力枚举：遍历所有列对判断 split 条件

assignments.title: ABC267C Index×A (Continuous)
assignments.reason: 前缀和：Σi*B_i(滑窗差分) = Σi*A_{start+i}，前缀和 O(1) 滑动

assignments.title: ABC267D Index×A (Not Continuous)
assignments.reason: 线性DP：dp[k] = 从前j个选k个的最大 k*A_j 加权和

assignments.title: ABC267E Erasing Vertices 2
assignments.reason: 二分答案：二分最大代价，贪心/拓扑排序验证可行性

assignments.title: ABC267Ex Odd Sum
assignments.reason: 线性DP：dp[奇/偶][sum] 选奇数个元素和为 M 的方案数

assignments.title: ABC267F Exactly K Steps
assignments.reason: 倍增LCA：找树上距离恰好为 K 的点，沿直径两端倍增跳
